headline: Seagate Stock Rises After Analyst Upgrades To Buy. Western Digital Nabs Price-Target Hike.
summary: Seagate Technology stock rose Friday, bouncing back from a recent pullback.  "With the recent market pullback and increasing confidence in what we view as a path to plus-$50 earnings-per-share and significant (capital) return capacity ahead, we upgrade STX to overweight with a $1,100 price target," Wells Fargo analyst Aaron Rakers said in a note for clients.  Rakers previously held a neutral equal-weight view for Seagate and a 900 price target.

headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades Seagate Technology Hldgs to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $1100
